title: HUD_kresh
description: “HUD_Kresh 1.18 1.21” modernizes Minecraft’s HUD with brighter hearts, metallic armor icons, and smoother hunger visuals, enhancing clarity while keeping the classic vanilla layout.
body:
# hello, discord ⬇
_____
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d473b452dbb15b24142dde1b1870051e9015d34c_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/PfknxDj2y)
____
This resource pack redesignsDisDiscord the Minecraft HUD icons with a more modern and vivid look. The health hearts are sharper and more colorful, giving a cleaner visual style. Armor icons have a metallic glow effect, while the hunger bar uses smooth and bright textures. The air bubbles and experience bar are enhanced with clearer outlines for better visibility. Overall, this pack focuses on a stylish and high-contrast interface that improves readability while keeping the vanilla layout.
____
The name of the resource pack is inspired by Youtuber minecraft name kresh
